publications.title: Navigating new normals: Student perceptions, experiences, and mental health service utilization in post-pandemic academia
publications.summary: Examines student mental-health service utilization patterns during the return-to-campus transition, identifying barriers to care for graduate public-health cohorts.

publications.title: Machine learning as a tool for early detection: A focus on late-stage colorectal cancer across socioeconomic spectrums
publications.summary: Applies machine-learning classifiers to population-level registry data to identify socioeconomic factors associated with late-stage colorectal cancer diagnosis, with specific attention to disparities across income and neighborhood tiers.

publications.title: Experiences with COVID-19 stress among Hispanic/Latino farmworkers
publications.journal: Journal of Agricultural Safety and Health
publications.summary: Mixed-methods characterization of pandemic-era stressors on Hispanic/Latino farmworkers in the Eastern US, informing occupational and public-health response frameworks.

publications.title: Pregnancy intention and breastfeeding behaviors in Virginia: A secondary analysis of PRAMS data
publications.summary: Secondary analysis of Virginia PRAMS data linking pregnancy intention to postpartum breastfeeding initiation and duration.

publications.title: Politics, preparedness, or resources: Examining state responsiveness to the COVID-19 pandemic
publications.summary: Cross-state analysis of early-pandemic responsiveness, disentangling the roles of political leadership, preparedness infrastructure, and resource availability.

publications.title: Is age of menarche directly related to vitamin D levels?
publications.summary: Tests whether serum 25-hydroxyvitamin D levels predict age at menarche after adjusting for BMI, adiposity, and dietary intake in a pediatric cohort.

publications.title: Observations of delayed changes in respiratory function among allergy clinic patients exposed to wildfire smoke
publications.journal: International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health
publications.summary: Documents delayed-onset respiratory function decline in allergy-clinic patients following wildfire smoke exposure, supporting longer observation windows in post-exposure screening.

publications.title: Racial disparities and treatment trends among young-onset colorectal cancer patients: An analysis of a hospital cancer registry
publications.summary: Characterizes racial disparities in treatment patterns and clinical presentation among early-onset colorectal cancer patients, drawing on an 8-year Virginia hospital registry.

publications.title: Predictive modeling and estimation of the doubling time of confirmed cases of COVID-19 in Niger
publications.journal: Annales de l'Université Abdou Moumouni de Niamey
publications.summary: Predictive modeling of COVID-19 case doubling time in Niger during the early-pandemic period, developed as a consulting collaboration for UNICEF.

publications.title: Predictors of biologic use and satisfaction among patients with psoriasis: An analysis and geographic visualization of the 2016 and 2017 National Psoriasis Foundation annual surveys
publications.journal: Journal of Psoriasis and Psoriatic Arthritis
publications.summary: Geographic and sociodemographic analysis of biologic therapy uptake among psoriasis patients in the US, combining two NPF survey waves.

publications.title: Postmortem dental records identification by dental hygiene students: A pilot study
publications.summary: Pilot study evaluating dental hygiene students’ ability to perform forensic identification from postmortem dental records.

publications.title: Controlling for confounding via propensity score methods can result in biased estimation of the conditional AUC: A simulation study
publications.summary: Demonstrates through a large simulation study that naive propensity-score adjustment biases the conditional AUC in diagnostic-accuracy studies, with implications for risk-prediction research in observational data.

publications.title: Fetal myocardial performance index in the third trimester of pregnancy: Feasibility and reproducibility of conventional spectral Doppler versus spectral tissue Doppler technique
publications.summary: Methodological comparison of two Doppler techniques for measuring fetal myocardial performance in the third trimester, assessing reproducibility and clinical feasibility.

publications.title: Injuries associated with hoverboard use: A review of the National Electronic Injury Surveillance System
publications.summary: NEISS-based surveillance analysis characterizing hoverboard-associated injury patterns by age, body region, and disposition, supporting product-safety policy discussion.

publications.title: Macrophages but not astrocytes harbor HIV DNA in the brains of HIV-1–infected aviremic individuals on suppressive antiretroviral therapy
publications.summary: Single-cell analysis localizing HIV DNA reservoirs to brain macrophages in aviremic individuals on suppressive antiretroviral therapy, with implications for HIV cure strategies.

publications.title: Moderate sedation or monitored anesthesia care for colonoscopies: Is there a difference?
publications.summary: Comparative-effectiveness analysis of sedation strategies for screening colonoscopy, assessing patient-reported outcomes and procedural efficiency.

publications.title: Relationship between cavum septi pellucidi measurements and fetal hypoplastic left heart syndrome or dextro-transposition of the great arteries
publications.summary: Evaluates fetal cavum septi pellucidi measurements as a prenatal ultrasound marker for major congenital heart defects.

publications.title: Structural barriers to comprehensive, coordinated HIV care: Geographic accessibility in the US South
publications.summary: Geographic-accessibility analysis of comprehensive HIV care in the US South, quantifying structural barriers across rural and urban contexts.

publications.title: The role of neighborhood characteristics in late-stage melanoma diagnosis among Hispanic men in California, Texas, and Florida, 1996–2012
publications.summary: Multi-state spatial analysis showing that neighborhood-level characteristics modulate late-stage melanoma diagnosis among Hispanic men over a 17-year window.

publications.title: Clinical outcomes of HIV care delivery models in the US: A systematic review
publications.summary: Systematic review synthesizing evidence on HIV care-delivery models in the US, mapping clinical outcomes to structural characteristics.
